samples.xml_description:
<module id="JC_counter">
    <description>Implement a 64-bit counter in a Johnson counter style.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset.</input>
        <output id="Q" width_description="[63:0]">Counter value.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="N" value_description="64">Define the bit width of the counter.</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
    The counter operates on the rising edge of the clock or the falling edge of the reset signal.
    If the reset signal is low, the counter is set to 0.
    If the least significant bit of the counter is 0, the counter is incremented by shifting the current value to the right and appending a 1 at the most significant bit position.
    If the least significant bit of the counter is 1, the counter is decremented by shifting the current value to the right and appending a 0 at the most significant bit position.
    </implementation>
</module>
